title: "Choose" functionality for automations

posts.author: Nichola_Petelo (Nichola Petelo)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

It would be great to be able to choose the board and group within a board when an automation is triggered and not have to have the board defined as part of the Automation script.

What are you trying to achieve

Much like you do when you highlight an item and click MOVE it allows you to select the board and then the group and then it moves it. But have this as part of the automation action trigger.

Example: I have a catalogue board. On the board is a button saying click me against each item line on the board. Client comes to the catalogue, choses the item they want clicks the order button, which triggers an automation that duplicates the item and then it pops up asking what project board they want to send the duplicated item to and what group on the board it is to sit under.

They will do this multiple times ordering the same items for different projects/events needing the item to be moved to different boards that may have only just been created.

Hence the need to have the ability to choose the board at the time of the automation trigger rather than at the time of the creation of the automation.
